---
name: Mia Mission
about: Open a structured mission for Mia to execute inside Oracle
title: "[MIA-XXX] Mission name"
labels: mia-mission
assignees: ''
---

## Mission ID
MIA-XXX

## Purpose
What is this mission for? What problem does it solve or what gap does it close?

## Priority
- [ ] P1 — Critical. Blocks other work.
- [ ] P2 — Important. Should not wait more than one cycle.
- [ ] P3 — Valid but can be scheduled.

## Output
What file, decision, standard, or recommendation will this mission produce?

- Output path: `oracle/mia/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-mission-name.md`

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Output is real and visible in `oracle/mia/reports/`
- [ ] Backlog updated in `oracle/docs/backlog.md`
- [ ] Memory updated if the system changed
- [ ] Next action named

## Context
Any relevant background, links to other missions, or constraints Mia should know before starting.

## Escalation Condition
What would cause Mia to pause and escalate this mission to human review?
